VAL-PATH-03.evidence: Test path_triangle_fill_winding in scene_render.rs:3869 — renders triangle (10,10)→(90,10)→(50,90) with Winding fill, red color on 100×100 black surface. Verifies interior center (50,40) is red (255,0,0), exterior (5,5) and (95,95) are black (0,0,0).

VAL-PATH-04.evidence: Test path_fill_rule_winding_vs_evenodd in scene_render.rs:3912 — renders concentric CW squares (outer 10-90, inner 30-70). Winding fills inner region (winding count=2, non-zero). EvenOdd leaves inner region unfilled (winding count=2, even). Verifies outer ring filled in both, inner center (50,50) filled in Winding (r>200) but not in EvenOdd (r<50), and buffers differ.

VAL-PATH-05.evidence: Test path_cubic_bezier_smooth_curve in scene_render.rs:3990 — renders shape with cubic Bezier top edge (control points bulging upward to y=10). Verifies interior body (50,70) is green, curve bulge area (50,30) is also green (proving cubic curves above the chord), and outside (50,5) is black. The comment explicitly notes that a LineTo replacement would not fill (50,30), proving the cubic flattening produces a curve.

(3) path_degenerate_cubic_collinear in scene_render.rs:4108 — cubic with collinear control points compared to LineTo equivalent, max pixel difference ≤2.
VAL-PATH-06.details: Tests in test/tests/scene_render.rs. path_empty_no_crash: 1 passed. path_unclosed_implicitly_closed: 1 passed. path_degenerate_cubic_collinear: 1 passed.
